headline: Ingersoll Rand Reports Another Milestone Year in Sustainability in 2025
summary: DAVIDSON, N.C., June 30, 2026--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR), a global leader in mission-critical flow creation and life science and industrial solutions, proudly announces it has again achieved a significant year in sustainability, innovation, and operational excellence. The company’s 2025 sustainability report showcases the impactful progress, milestones and responsible business practices.
